products.title: Apple of My Eye
products.body_html:
For the one who has your whole heart.

A crisp, glossy beaded apple that says "you're my favourite" without a single word. Apple of My Eye is the charm you gift — to your best friend, your sister, your daughter, or yourself (because self-love counts).

Handcrafted with glass beads in rich red and bright green. The leaf on top is the detail that makes it. Clip it on anything and watch it become the thing everyone comments on.

  • Beaded fruit bag charm
  • Apple design
  • Clip attachment
  • 100% vegan materials

Pairs well with: Enamel Pin in Sunset Ranunculus — warm reds, endless charm.

Head over heels. Hanging from your bag.

A plump, beaded strawberry that says what you're feeling without saying a word. Berry in Love is the charm for romantics — the ones who send flowers for no reason and believe every bag deserves a personality.

Handcrafted with glass beads in shades of red and green. Clips onto bags, backpacks, or jacket zippers. Small enough to be charming, bold enough to be noticed.

Make a wish. Wear it.

Warm vanilla, sugared almond, and the faintest whisper of buttercream — this is the scent of celebration without the occasion. Birthday Cake smells like the moment right before you blow out candles: hopeful, sweet, entirely yours.

Not a gourmand cliché. This is gourmand grown up — a skin scent that sits close and pulls people in. Best worn on days that deserve a little magic (which is all of them).

Scent Notes

  • Top: bergamot, sugared almond
  • Heart: vanilla orchid, buttercream

  • Available in 15ml (travel) and 100ml (full size)

Pairs well with: Lip Ganache in Tiramisu — dessert-scented everything, and we mean it.

products.title: Hot Cocoa Tinted Lip Ganache
products.body_html:
Warm from the first swipe.

A caramel-kissed lip ganache that wraps your mouth in the warmth of the first sip. Not dark, not bitter. This is the golden, milky, brown-sugar side of cocoa, the one that feels like a cashmere blanket in color form. Smells like a mug you don't want to put down.

The warmth isn't just sensory—it's therapeutic. This formula combines peptide complexes for barrier repair with tri-level hyaluronic acid for deep hydration. Natural cocoa extracts provide antioxidant protection while the 98% clean composition delivers clinical-grade comfort.

The Sensory Experience

Close your eyes. You're holding a ceramic mug, heavy and handmade, filled with something slow-stirred and steaming. Not the sharp, dark kind of chocolate. The other one. The one with caramel swirled through warm milk, a dusting of raw cacao, a whisper of vanilla that only shows up at the very end. That is what Hot Cocoa smells like against your skin. The shade is a tawny, honeyed neutral with just enough warmth to glow, the color of candlelight on bare skin. On the lips, it feels like a second skin that happens to be softer than your first. This is the shade for slow mornings, long evenings, and every quiet moment you're building a beautiful life inside of.

That second skin feeling is precision-engineered: Plant squalane creates a biomimetic moisture barrier while peptides work at the cellular level to improve lip texture over time. The antioxidant-rich cocoa extracts don't just smell divine—they actively protect against environmental damage, making every cozy moment a beauty treatment.
products.tags: Cozy & Nurturing, Cruelty-Free, Dessert-Scented, Lip Ganache, Sweet Treat Collection, Vegan, Warm & Chocolatey

products.title: Maraschino Cherry Tinted Lip Ganache
products.body_html:
A little dangerous. Entirely worth it.

Deep red with a pulse. Maraschino Cherry is the boldest shade in the collection, a saturated, moody red that reads like confidence with a sweet tooth. The scent is that bright, syrupy, unmistakable cherry, the one you always steal from the top of the glass.

The boldness goes beyond color: Advanced peptide technology promotes natural lip volume while multi-weight hyaluronic acid systems provide both immediate plumping and long-term hydration. The 98% clean formula ensures your most daring shade is also your safest choice.

The Sensory Experience

This is the color that makes people pause mid-sentence. A red so deliberate it almost feels like a dare. Maraschino Cherry doesn't tiptoe into a room. It arrives. The pigment is deep and lush, somewhere between a vintage Hollywood pout and a cherry dropped into something sparkling. There's warmth in it, but there's an edge too, a richness that borders on dramatic and lands right at stunning. The formula clings to every curve of the lip without settling or feathering, just pure, unapologetic color. And the scent is the thing that makes it personal: sweet, syrupy, unmistakably cherry, like biting into the garnish before anyone's watching. Bold shade. Soft mouth. The contrast is the whole point.

That perfect cling isn't just formulation luck—it's clinical precision. The advanced peptide complex supports the natural structure of your lips while biocompatible plant squalane prevents moisture evaporation without compromising color intensity. Cherry extracts provide antioxidant benefits, so your most dramatic look is also your most protective. The 12-hour wear isn't just about color—it's about maintaining that soft-mouth feeling while looking absolutely stunning.
products.tags: Bold & Cherry, Confident & Daring, Cruelty-Free, Dessert-Scented, Lip Ganache, Sweet Treat Collection, Vegan

Named for the goddess with eyes like a fish — wide, watching, beautiful. Meenakshi opens with jasmine absolute and warm saffron, then settles into sandalwood, turmeric, and a soft haze of incense. It smells like walking through a temple courtyard at sunset, the stone still warm under your feet.

This is a scent for women who understand that beauty has always been sacred. Wear it like a prayer you keep to yourself.

Scent Notes

  • Top: jasmine absolute, saffron

  • Base: sandalwood, incense, amber
  • Available in 15ml (travel) and 100ml (full size)

products.body_html:
For the woman who comes alive at night.

Cool, luminous, a little mysterious. Moonchild opens with iced pear and white tea, then deepens into night-blooming jasmine and violet leaf before settling on your skin as clean musk and silver birch. It smells like moonlight made liquid.

This is the fragrance for quiet confidence — the kind that doesn't announce itself but absolutely fills the room. Late dinners. Gallery openings. 2 AM conversations that change everything.

Scent Notes

  • Top: iced pear, white tea, bergamot

products.title: Raspberry Coulis Tinted Lip Ganache
products.body_html:
Tart on the tongue. Sweet on the lips.

A berry-toned lip ganache that blurs the line between fruit and flower. Sheer, buildable color with a glossy, balm-like finish that smells exactly like fresh raspberries simmered down to their most gorgeous concentrate.

Advanced beyond beauty: This peptide-enriched formula delivers 12-hour clinical hydration through hyaluronic acid technology and plant squalane barrier protection. The 98% clean formulation transforms your daily ritual into therapeutic lip care.

The Sensory Experience

Imagine dragging a silver spoon through a warm pool of raspberry coulis, the kind plated beneath a perfect panna cotta at the kind of restaurant that doesn't list prices. That tartness, that brightness, that almost-floral bite of ripe berry at the very peak of its season. This is what your lips smell like now. The color lands somewhere between crushed berry and rosé stain, sheer enough to layer, pigmented enough to notice. The texture is rich without weight, glossy without stick. It feels like velvet that melted. You will reapply not because it faded, but because the ritual of it is too good to do just once.

What makes this ritual even more irresistible? Each application delivers bioactive peptides that support natural collagen production while hyaluronic acid binds moisture 1000x its weight. The plant squalane creates a protective barrier that mimics your skin's natural oils, ensuring that luxurious feeling lasts a full 12 hours.
products.tags: Cruelty-Free, Dessert-Scented, Fruity, Lip Ganache, Romantic & Fresh, Sweet Treat Collection, Vegan

products.title: Strawberry Jam Tinted Lip Ganache
products.body_html:
Your sweetest habit.

Pink, plush, and unapologetically sweet. Strawberry Jam is the lip ganache equivalent of a warm scone situation: classic, comforting, and impossibly pretty. The scent is sun-ripe strawberry preserves, the kind made slowly, by hand, with too much fruit and not enough sugar.

Beneath this sweetness lies serious science: Advanced peptide technology works to naturally enhance lip volume while pharmaceutical-grade hyaluronic acid provides continuous moisture. The 98% clean formula means every indulgent moment also delivers therapeutic benefits.

The Sensory Experience

There is a particular pink that only exists in two places: the inside of a strawberry, sliced clean through on a summer morning, and on a mouth wearing this. Strawberry Jam is the shade your lips already want to be, just more. More saturated, more cushioned, more alive. The formula is dense with moisture, a pillowy coat that makes your mouth feel like something from a still life painting. And the fragrance is not perfume, not candy. It's real strawberry sweetness, the kind that stains your fingertips and lingers on warm toast. Put it on. Press your lips together. You'll smile before the mirror even reflects it back.

That pillowy feeling? It's more than texture—it's hydration technology. The moisturizing effect comes from a complex of bioactive peptides and multi-weight hyaluronic acid that penetrates, plumps, and protects. Plant squalane ensures that cushioned feeling maintains for 12 hours, turning your sweetest habit into your smartest beauty choice.
products.tags: Classic & Comforting, Cruelty-Free, Dessert-Scented, Lip Ganache, Sweet & Fruity, Sweet Treat Collection, Vegan

The Sweet Treat formula glides on creamy, sets to a soft satin finish, and carries a scent that's genuinely dessert — sweet raspberry with a hint of tartness. You'll catch yourself reapplying just because you want to.

Scented like real strawberry preserves, this lip ganache is creamy, buildable, and designed to make your morning routine feel like a treat. One swipe for softness. Two for statement.

Layered. Sophisticated. Worth lingering over.

products.title: Tiramisu Tinted Lip Ganache
products.body_html:
Sophisticated on contact.

A coffee-toned lip ganache for the person who takes their beauty as seriously as their espresso order. Layered, warm, and quietly complex. Tiramisu smells like mascarpone and fresh espresso and the last perfect bite of something you ordered because you have taste.

The sophistication extends to the science: Pharmaceutical-grade ingredients including peptides for collagen synthesis and hyaluronic acid for moisture reservoir creation. Natural coffee extracts provide antioxidant protection while the 98% clean formula delivers luxury with clinical efficacy.

The Sensory Experience

Some shades are simple. This one has layers. Tiramisu opens with a cool espresso undertone, a grounded, slightly smoky brown that reads as effortlessly polished. But underneath, there's warmth: a cocoa-dusted softness, a creaminess that keeps it from ever feeling severe. It's the beauty equivalent of something that looks easy but isn't. On the lips, the texture is impossibly smooth, the kind of formula that makes you run your tongue across your bottom lip just to confirm it's real. The scent blooms slowly. First the coffee note, roasted and rich. Then the sweetness underneath, soft mascarpone, a dusting of cacao, something that lingers the way a good dessert haunts you on the drive home. This is not your casual, grab-and-go shade. This is the one you reach for when you want to feel like the most interesting person at the table.

Those complex layers aren't just olfactory—they're functional. The impossibly smooth texture comes from peptide technology that supports natural collagen synthesis while pharmaceutical-grade hyaluronic acid creates a moisture reservoir that lasts. The plant squalane provides biomimetic hydration that maintains that "confirm it's real" feeling for 12 hours. The antioxidant coffee extracts work actively to protect against free radical damage, making your most sophisticated choice also your most intelligent one.
products.tags: Coffee & Complex, Cruelty-Free, Dessert-Scented, Lip Ganache, Sophisticated & Layered, Sweet Treat Collection, Vegan

Beauty, clipped and ready.

A miniature metallic purse charm housed in a charm that clips right onto your bag, your keys, or your jacket zipper. The Silver TLG Metallic Purse Charm is equal parts practical and pretty — hydrating balm in a refillable capsule that catches light with every step.

Golden hour, on the go.

Warm gold. Polished. Clipped to your favourite bag like it was always meant to be there. The Gold TLG Metallic Purse Charm holds a hydrating vegan tinted lip ganache in a refillable capsule — so your lips stay soft and your look stays intentional.

This is the charm for the woman who matches her accessories to her energy: warm, bright, impossible to ignore.

products.title: White Lily of the Valley Enamel Pin
products.body_html:
Quiet. Graceful. Deceptively strong.

Delicate white bells hanging from a curved green stem — the lily of the valley is one of the most recognizable flowers in the world, and one of the most quietly powerful. This enamel pin captures that duality: beauty that doesn't need volume.

Enameled in crisp white and fresh green. A pin for minimalists, romantics, and anyone in between.

  • Hard enamel pin
  • Floral design: lily of the valley
  • Butterfly clutch backing
  • 100% vegan materials

Pairs well with: Niche Perfume in Moonchild — white florals, silver light.
products.tags: accessory, enamel, floral, pin

products.title: Zest Friends Forever
products.body_html:
For the one who always brightens the group.

A round, radiant beaded orange that's basically a friendship declaration for your bag. Zest Friends Forever is the charm you buy in pairs — one for you, one for her. Because some friendships deserve a commemorative citrus.

Handcrafted with glass beads in warm orange and green. Vibrant, tactile, and perfectly sized to hang from any bag without overwhelming it.

  • Beaded fruit bag charm
  • Orange design
  • Clip attachment
  • 100% vegan materials

Pairs well with: The Carry Your World Pouch in "It's Giving" — orange energy, amplified.
